Frequently asked questions

How many lawyers are in Fulton County, GA?

1,233 lawyers and law firms across 13 cities in Fulton County are listed here, 864 firms and 369 solo attorneys.

Which cities in Fulton County have lawyers listed?

Atlanta (917), Alpharetta (167), Roswell (58), Sandy Springs (26), College Park (24), Johns Creek (18), East Point (6), Milton (6), and more.

Who is a top rated lawyer in Fulton County?

Allen Lightcap, Attorney at Law in Atlanta is among the highest rated, with 5.0 stars across 74 reviews.

Attorney advertising. Georgia Lawyer Directory is an independent directory, not a law firm or lawyer referral service, and does not provide legal advice or endorse any attorney. Listings marked Premium are paid placements; rankings reflect ratings and verified reviews and are not for sale. Prior results do not guarantee a similar outcome.
